description: Local offline-first registry of built-in Velocity packs. Used by /marketplace when the remote registry (https://registry.velocity.dev/) is unavailable or local-only mode is active.
local_only_mode_note: Set VELOCITY_REGISTRY_OFFLINE=true or run /marketplace with --offline to force use of this file exclusively.

packs.name: FinTech Domain Pack
packs.description: Payments, ledger, KYC/AML, reconciliation context and guardrails for financial services products.

packs.name: HealthTech Domain Pack
packs.description: FHIR, PHI handling, claims processing, and interoperability context and guardrails for healthcare products.

packs.name: E-Commerce Domain Pack
packs.description: Order management, inventory, pricing, and marketplace design context and guardrails for e-commerce products.

packs.name: Git Workflow Guardrails
packs.description: Standard git safety hooks: block force-push, hard-reset, secret patterns in commits.

packs.name: SOC 2 Compliance Pack
packs.description: SOC 2 Type II control guardrails: access control, audit logging, change management, availability.

packs.name: HIPAA Compliance Pack
packs.description: HIPAA Security Rule and Privacy Rule guardrails: PHI encryption, access control, audit trails, BAA requirements.

packs.name: PCI-DSS Compliance Pack
packs.description: PCI DSS v4 guardrails: cardholder data protection, network security, access control, monitoring.

packs.name: ISO 27001 Compliance Pack
packs.description: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 information security management guardrails: asset management, risk treatment, access control.

fallback_policy: On network failure, use local registry only. Warn the developer: 'Remote registry unavailable — showing local packs only. Run /marketplace with --online to retry.'
